dod: Fully build the Cheffy module on the getting-cheffy branch per CHEFFY-SYSTEM.md (the design contract / DoD). Cheffy is an animated SVG chef-hat corner assistant for the Food of the Week Astro site, progressive-enhancement only -- the site must build clean and behave exactly like master with Cheffy's JS disabled. Replace the scaffold stubs (src/components/Cheffy.astro, CheffyPanel.astro, src/data/cheffy-dialogue.json, src/utils/cheffyCalendar.ts, src/assets/cheffy-animated.svg, public/sw.js) with real implementations and wire <Cheffy /> into src/layouts/Layout.astro. Deliver, per CHEFFY-SYSTEM.md acceptance: (1) corner mascot with expression states + state machine (idle/attention/dialogue/processing) keyed off the existing per-week localStorage id; (2) data-driven dialogue panel; (3) calendar sync -- time extraction from the week Markdown + valid ICS add-all + per-recipe mini ICS + Google Calendar link, in cheffyCalendar.ts; (4) opt-in local notifications via public/sw.js triggered only from a dialogue action, degrading cleanly on unsupported browsers; (5) checklist JSON+Markdown export and import reusing GroceryList.astro localStorage state; (6) honor prefers-reduced-motion; (7) animated README demo SVG. Reuse existing conventions (LunchGroceryAddon.astro, Footer.astro, weekParser.ts, tailwind.config.mjs color system). Done = npm run build passes (astro check && astro build), no console errors on any page, all CHEFFY-SYSTEM.md acceptance bullets met.
